LanguageData.WULA_MechSerumHealerAllFixed: All of {0}'s health conditions have been repaired.
LanguageData.WULA_MechSerumHealerNoConditionsFixed: {0} has no health conditions to repair.
LanguageData.WULA_MechSerumHealerNotWula: {0} is not a Wula synth. This repair kit cannot be used.
LanguageData.WULA_PassionGained: {0} has developed a new passion for {1}.
LanguageData.WULA_PassionLost: As a cost, {0} has lost passion for {1}.
LanguageData.PawnHasNoSkills: {0} has no skills and cannot use this.
LanguageData.SkillTrainerHasNoSkill: No target skill is set for this trainer.
LanguageData.SkillDisabled: The target skill is disabled and cannot be learned.
